meta.title: XICO — an AI & design product company
meta.description: XICO is a technology company blending AI, product and design, founded in Tokyo and Changsha. We build our own products, and help partners turn ideas into products that actually ship and run.

hero.subtitle: XICO is a technology company blending artificial intelligence, product and design. We build our own products, and help partners turn ideas into products that actually ship and run.

capabilities.title: Full-stack product capability
capabilities.subtitle: From an idea to a live product, XICO can deliver every step in-house.

items.title: AI Engineering
items.desc: LLM apps, agents, RAG and recommendation — bringing frontier capability into real, reliable products.

items.title: Product Design
items.desc: From brand to interface, we define every detail of the experience in a design-led way.

items.title: Software Engineering
items.desc: From web and mobile to cloud-native infrastructure — robust, maintainable delivery.

items.title: Growth & Global
items.desc: For cross-border commerce and study-abroad, connecting China with world markets.

work.title: Products in the making
work.subtitle: We are builders and founders — pouring our craft into products we believe in.

items.name: Machi
items.desc: Find the echoes of life in every city. A global city-living platform uniting housing, classifieds, jobs, local services and community.

items.name: Shangence
items.desc: Measure before you start. A risk-assessment and capital stop-loss platform helping China's micro-entrepreneurs decide with data.

items.name: More on the way
items.desc: New business lines are incubating, bringing XICO's capability to broader markets.

approach.title: How we work
approach.subtitle: Four principles that run through every XICO product.

principles.title: AI-native
principles.desc: We treat AI as the foundation of the product, not a feature bolted on afterwards.

principles.title: Design-led
principles.desc: We make aesthetics and experience the real competitive edge.

principles.title: Built to last
principles.desc: Systems that are maintainable, scalable and stand the test of time.

principles.title: Globally minded
principles.desc: Designed for multiple languages and markets from day one.

cta.title: Have an idea? Let's build it together.
cta.subtitle: Whether it's a product collaboration, technical consulting, or joining XICO — we'd love to hear from you.

footer.tagline: A technology company building products with AI and design. Founded in Tokyo and Changsha — built for the world.

about.title: We use technology and taste to build things that last.
about.subtitle: XICO is a technology company founded in Tokyo and Changsha, with AI and design at its core.
story: XICO believes the best products are born at the intersection of engineering and design. We are developers and founders alike — pouring our craft into products we truly believe in.

With AI as the foundation and design as the language, we build digital products from mobile apps to business platforms. And we keep extending that capability into new fields like cross-border commerce and study abroad.
Our goal is simple: to make good products that endure — and travel beyond borders.

items.title: Taste is leverage
items.desc: Detail defines quality; quality defines trust.

items.title: AI as leverage
items.desc: So a small team can build outsized impact.

items.title: Long-term
items.desc: We work for decisions that still hold years later.

items.title: Global by nature
items.desc: From China, built for the world.

founder.name: Yao Kai · 姚凱
founder.quote: The best products are born at the intersection of engineering and design.
bio: I believe real product strength comes from building with real-world operations as the premise — seeing a thing through end to end, from finding the problem, defining requirements and designing the experience, to launch, payments, support and back office.

I bring a full-stack mindset that connects front-end, mobile, back-end, databases and cloud infrastructure into one coherent product — and I care about payments, admin dashboards, legal compliance and security: the details that make a service actually run.
I work across Chinese, Japanese and English, communicating and collaborating across cultures. XICO is where that belief becomes product.

services.title: From idea to launch — end to end.
services.subtitle: XICO offers full product capability, and can flexibly step in wherever you need.

sections.title: AI Engineering
sections.desc: Turning large models and agents into stable, controllable, shippable products.

sections.title: Product Design
sections.desc: Defining brand and experience in a design-led way that earns trust at first sight.

sections.title: Software Engineering
sections.desc: Building complete, maintainable systems from front-end to cloud-native infrastructure.

sections.title: Growth & Global
sections.desc: Taking products cross-border and multi-market — connecting China with the world.

careers.title: Build the future of cities and commerce with us.
careers.subtitle: XICO is a small, high-craft team. We build real, operating products with AI and design — and we're looking for people who want to build for the long run.
careers.noRoles: No public roles right now — but we always welcome great people. Just write to us.

join.title: If you believe in what we're building.
join.subtitle: XICO is building long-term products like Machi and Shangence, and expanding into study-abroad and cross-border. Whether you're an investor, a hands-on project partner, or a collaborator — we'd love to meet you.
